summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vista Comité feature. Backend API (GET /api/vista-comite) passes all 8 tests. Frontend UI fully functional with multi-select filters, severity badges, CSV/PNG export, KPI cards, and color-coded ratio table.
passed_tests: GET /api/vista-comite - Requires authentication (401 without token)
GET /api/vista-comite - Empty informes param returns empty list
GET /api/vista-comite - Returns aggregated data for single informe with correct structure
GET /api/vista-comite - Returns data for multiple informes (one row per informe)
GET /api/vista-comite - Severidad filter parameter accepted
GET /api/vista-comite - Responsable field populated correctly (comma-separated for multiple)
GET /api/vista-comite - Total calculations correct (sum of severity counts)
GET /api/vista-comite - Data integrity matches /api/vulnerabilidades endpoint
UI: Vista Comité page loads correctly after login
UI: Navigation sidebar has 'Vista Comité' link
UI: Multi-select filter for Informes/Alcance works (Todos/Ninguno buttons)
UI: Severidad badges filter toggle works (hides/shows columns)
UI: Table displays correct ratio format (Pendiente/Total)
UI: Color coding works (green=0%, yellow=50%, orange=75%, red=100%)
UI: CSV export button downloads vista_comite_YYYY-MM-DD.csv
UI: Image PPT export button downloads vista_comite_YYYY-MM-DD.png
UI: KPI cards show correct totals (17/40 Críticas, 39/80 Altas, 102/219 Total, 47%)
UI: Responsable column shows multiple responsables when applicable
UI: TOTALES row displays at bottom with aggregated values
UI: Refresh button reloads data correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vista Comité feature fully tested and working. Key details: 1) Backend endpoint at GET /api/vista-comite accepts 'informes' (comma-separated, URL-encoded) and 'severidades' params. 2) Returns aggregated data grouped by nombre_informe_pentest with pending/total ratios per severity. 3) Frontend uses html2canvas for PNG export. 4) 27 informes with 219 total vulnerabilities, 102 pending (47%). 5) Color coding: green (0%), light green (≤25%), yellow (≤50%), orange (≤75%), red (>75%).
